UR RTDE Dashboard Studio¶

A combined Universal Robots RTDE dashboard and Python API workspace.

The documentation is split into:

  • a practical dashboard guide,

  • a separate Python API guide,

  • RTDE background and naming rules,

  • troubleshooting notes,

  • and a GitHub Pages deployment guide for Sphinx.

Contents

  • Getting started
    • Windows setup
    • Single-source configuration
    • Recommended starting points
  • RTDE background
    • What RTDE is
    • Why field names are kept literal
    • Output recipe vs input recipe
    • GP inputs vs GP outputs
    • Frequency and load
    • Current-window safety view
  • Dashboard guide
    • Overview
    • How to run it
    • Key panels
    • Recommended field profiles
  • Python API
    • Simple wrapper: UR_RTDE
    • Core class: URRobot
    • Async example
    • Reading values
    • Writing GP inputs
    • Conversion helpers
    • Suggested integration pattern
  • Troubleshooting
    • Unsupported RTDE fields
    • Start rejected
    • Actual rate drops over time
    • GP write does not work
    • Digital twin visible but links are misaligned
    • Digital twin not visible
  • Publishing with Sphinx and GitHub Pages
    • Local HTML build
    • Repository workflow
    • Required GitHub repository setting
    • Minimal command summary
    • What to commit
  • API reference
    • Wrapper module
    • Core RTDE module
